headline: Barclays Maintained an “Overweight” rating on Lam Research Corporation (LRCX)
summary: Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the 10 Best Semiconductor Stocks to Buy According to Billionaires. On June 11, Barclays analyst Tom O’Malley raised his price target on Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) to $335 from $275. The analyst maintained an “Overweight” rating on the shares. He pointed out a wafer-fab-equipment capital spending cycle that […]
